title: BoardFlow Platform Overview
content:
# BoardFlow Platform Overview

BoardFlow is a self-hosted collaborative whiteboard platform built around a CRDT collaboration core.

## Collaboration model
- CRDT-based state sync over WebSocket fanout
- Validated for 120 concurrent editors per board in the reference benchmark
- Presence and cursor updates are decoupled from object sync

## Storage and deployment
- PostgreSQL for board metadata
- Object storage for assets and snapshots
- Docker Compose quick start
- Helm chart for Kubernetes production deployment
- Region pinning supported for asset and snapshot storage

## Security and compliance
- Built-in audit log export
- Customer-managed encryption keys supported for object storage
- Region-aware storage policy can pin EU members to EU buckets

## Operational notes
- Monthly release cadence
- Typical production rollout: 2-4 days for a platform team

title: BoardFlow GitHub
content:
# BoardFlow GitHub Snapshot

- Stars: 7200
- Open issues: 38
- Contributors in last 90 days: 74
- Releases in last 12 months: 12
- Median security patch turnaround: 4 days
- Latest release: v5.3.1

## Community notes
Roadmap and upgrade notes are updated monthly. Two recent auth fixes shipped within 3 and 5 days.

title: CanvasGrid Platform Overview
content:
# CanvasGrid Platform Overview

CanvasGrid is a self-hosted collaborative canvas using an OT synchronization layer.

## Collaboration model
- Operational Transform over WebSocket gateway
- Validated for 60 concurrent editors per board
- Heavier contention under large shape batches than CRDT-first systems

## Storage and deployment
- PostgreSQL for core metadata
- Redis Streams for sync event fanout
- Optional S3-compatible object storage for media assets
- Docker images available; Kubernetes deployment supported through community chart

## Security and compliance
- EU data residency plugin available in beta
- Audit export exists but requires enterprise plugin enablement
- Encryption at rest depends on external storage configuration

## Operational notes
- Quarterly release cadence
- Plugin compatibility should be checked before minor upgrades

title: CanvasGrid GitHub
content:
# CanvasGrid GitHub Snapshot

- Stars: 4800
- Open issues: 91
- Contributors in last 90 days: 33
- Releases in last 12 months: 4
- Median security patch turnaround: 16 days
- Latest release: v3.4.0

## Community notes
The project is still healthy, but several operators mention extra upgrade work when OT workers and Redis schemas change together.

title: SyncSlate Platform Overview
content:
# SyncSlate Platform Overview

SyncSlate is a lightweight collaborative canvas originally designed for small internal teams.

## Collaboration model
- Single relay-based WebSocket sync service
- Peak validated concurrency: 35 concurrent editors per board
- No CRDT conflict-free merge model; reconnect bursts can cause object drift under load

## Storage and deployment
- Single PostgreSQL database plus local disk assets
- No official Kubernetes deployment guide
- Common self-hosted installs rely on handcrafted VM scripts

## Security and compliance
- No region pinning support
- No built-in audit log
- Encryption relies on reverse proxy termination only

## Operational notes
- Limited roadmap visibility
- Best fit remains small single-region teams

title: SyncSlate GitHub
content:
# SyncSlate GitHub Snapshot

- Stars: 2100
- Open issues: 147
- Contributors in last 90 days: 11
- Releases in last 12 months: 2
- Security patch SLA: none published
- Latest release: v2.2.0

## Community notes
Operators report that region-aware compliance controls must be implemented externally. Several bugfix pull requests remained open for over 30 days.

title: EU Data Residency Whiteboard Cutover Playbook
content:
# EU Data Residency Whiteboard Cutover Playbook

Recommended phased rollout for collaborative whiteboard migration with GDPR constraints:

1. Keep EU member data in EU-resident object storage and metadata replicas
2. Run a pilot board with 10-15 heavy editors before global rollout
3. Validate audit logs, backup restore and region-specific access control
4. Run dual-track operations for 2 weeks while comparing board activity and restore drills
5. Define rollback thresholds before DNS / SSO cutover
6. Keep read-only export access on the old platform until attachment parity is confirmed

Risk controls:
- Assign a rollback owner
- Predefine replica lag thresholds
- Document EU / non-EU data split and key management
